Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7009 "HEADACHE-8000-7009" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Headache.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $8000 to copy the colour RAM data from $9C00 (where it was present in the original game) and display the loading screen. It then waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Also patched line number 4120 in the BASIC program to remove the second NEXT, allowing the game to start more quickly after game loaded message screen.
Also zeroed out the following memory ranges as they contained an unnecessary repeating memory block:
$6B00 - $6FFF $7010 - $8BFF $9000 - $967F $C000 - $CFFF
